title: Test Subject #C{Count}

moves.title: Respawn
effects: Revive with new HP pool (scales by player count)
After 1st death: Revive with 212 HP (×players), gain Painful Stabs
After 2nd death: Revive with 313 HP (×players), gain Nemesis, lose Adaptable and Painful Stabs

moves.title: Multi-Claw
effects: Deal 11 damage × 3 hits (hit count increases by 1 each use)

move_pattern: Starts in Phase 1 with Bite. Phase 1 cycles: Bite → Skull Bash → repeat. When reduced to 0 HP, Respawn triggers a phase transition. Phase 2 (after 1st respawn): Loops Multi-Claw indefinitely, with hit count increasing by 1 each use (starting at 3 hits). Phase 3 (after 2nd respawn): Cycles Lacerate → Big Pounce → Burning Growl → repeat.
notes:
Multi-phase boss with three separate HP pools. Phase 1: 111 HP (ascension). Phase 2: 212 HP (ascension) × player count — gains Painful Stabs. Phase 3: 313 HP (ascension) × player count — gains Nemesis, loses Adaptable and Painful Stabs.

Adaptable power prevents true death in phases 1 and 2; instead the Respawn move triggers a revive sequence. The monster only truly dies (including from Doom) in Phase 3 after Adaptable is removed.

Multi-Claw's hit count starts at 3 and permanently increases by 1 each time it is used throughout Phase 2.

The monster's display name includes a persistent kill counter starting at #8 (e.g. 'Test Subject #8' on first encounter), incrementing by 1 with each kill across runs.

Enrage is applied at ascension value 3 (base: 2). Burning Growl adds 5 Burn cards (base: 3) and grants 3 Strength (base: 2).
